# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
    region: us-central1

- name: app-firewall-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '22'
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    targetTags:
    - app-server

- name: app-firewall-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
      - '443'
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    targetTags:
    - app-server

- name: app-firewall-lb-health-check
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    targetTags:
    - app-server

- name: app-storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
        - app-server
      disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
          diskSizeGb: 20
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
        subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            apt-get update
            apt-get install -y apache2
            systemctl start apache2
            systemctl enable apache2
            echo "<h1>Application Server</h1>" > /var/www/html/index.html

- name: app-instance-group-manager
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    targetSize: 2
    baseInstanceName: app-instance
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: 80

- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: 80
    requestPath: /
    checkIntervalSec: 10
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.app-instance-group-manager.instanceGroup)
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      capacityScaler: 1.0
      maxUtilization: 0.8

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-target-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-global-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.app-target-http-proxy.selfLink)

- name: app-cloudsql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: allow-all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"

- name: app-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    name: appdb
    instance: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.name)
    charset: utf8mb4

- name: app-db-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    name: appuser
    instance: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.name)
    password: ChangeThisPassword123!
    host: "%"

outputs:
- name: load-balancer-ip
  value: $(ref.app-global-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
- name: storage-bucket-name
  value: $(ref.app-storage-bucket.name)
- name: cloudsql-connection-name
  value: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.connectionName)
- name: cloudsql-ip
  value: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
